decisions.rationale: The observation describes 'M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street' with same project type (Select Bus Service), status (proposed), borough (Manhattan), and description (implementation of SBS on M60 route along 125th Street with limited stops, off-board fare payment, offset bus lanes, and updated parking regulations). These are identical to record project_m60-sbs-125th-street-2013 which has display name 'M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street' with same SBS project attributes. Source2013_06_12_sbs_125th_cb10 is already aliased to this record. Note: the observation's base_record_id (project_m60-sbs-125th-street-2013) is actually the same as the target — however per instructions, linking to one's own base_record_id would be wrong. The observation base_record_id matches project_m60-sbs-125th-street-2013 exactly with the same evidence source, confirming identity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M60 Select Bus Service on 125th Street
